chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-85 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For hearing of CMA 356/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asfaydyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5. Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
